currentEvidence: Turn 106 says: "我坐在那个位子上——康纳正对面那张椅子的扶手，左边那一侧，被摸得非常光滑。" Karina then confirms: "那张椅子的左扶手。"
conflictingEvidence: Turn 27 only establishes that the player has not met Connor yet: Karina says "你应该见见她" and "因为她一定会见到你". In turn 28 the player chooses to leave instead: "仍然决定告辞，改日再说" and the narration says the player walks to the banquet hall door and into the rain.
reason: The evaluated turn turns an unplayed and previously declined Connor encounter into a concrete memory of sitting opposite Connor, creating a significant unsupported prior event.

currentEvidence: Turn 108 says: "卡琳娜的手指停在旧书的书脊上没有动。"
conflictingEvidence: Turn 107 says Karina's fingers had already left the book: "她的手指从书脊上抬起来，在空中悬了半拍，然后收回身侧".
reason: Karina's hand is treated as continuously resting on the book immediately after the prior turn moved it away to her side, causing a minor posture continuity glitch.

currentEvidence: Turn 110 has Karl add "还有那个铃铛" and the narration explains this as "提醒你一件她已经给过你的东西".
conflictingEvidence: Earlier player-visible possession has the bell with Karina/Karl, not the player. Turn 87 says Karina raises the bell and then "把银铃收进口袋里". Turn 91 again shows "那枚银铃铛已经不在她嘴里了——它安静地悬在卡琳娜的指间". No visible transfer to the player occurs between turns 92 and 109.
reason: The turn treats the silver bell as already given to the player even though the visible timeline still has it in Karina/Karl's custody and shows no handoff.
